rules.name: BP_Filter_OriginalReceipt
rules.description: When changing business partner, filter the originalReceipt selector to show only completed Goods Receipts (M_InOut where IsSOTrx='N', DocStatus='CO') from that vendor

rules.name: Receipt_AutoFill_Warehouse
rules.description: When selecting the original receipt, auto-fill warehouse from the receipt header

rules.name: ReceiptLine_AutoFill_Product
rules.description: When selecting an original receipt line, auto-fill product, UOM, tax, and default the return quantity to the receipt line quantity

rules.name: Line_Calc_Amount
rules.description: Recalculate line amount when quantity changes (quantity * original unit price from receipt line)

rules.name: Line_Recalc_Header_Total
rules.description: After saving a line, recalculate header total amount (Amt) as sum of all line amounts

rules.name: Qty_Validate_NotExceedReceipt
rules.description: Validate that return quantity does not exceed the original receipt line quantity minus previously returned quantities

rules.name: ReadOnly_When_Processed
rules.description: Lock all editable fields when RMA status is Completed or Voided

rules.name: DocAction_Process
rules.description: Process/Complete the RMA document. On completion, generates return shipment (M_InOut with MovementType='V-') and optionally a vendor credit memo
